shopping_255.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent failed to recognize and explicitly select the "Black" color option, despite it appearing to be the default, leading to a "This is a required field" error when attempting to add the item to the cart.
2. Instead of addressing the "required field" error directly on the product page, the agent unnecessarily cleared the shopping cart and re-navigated to the product, leading to a longer and less efficient path.
shopping_255.REFLECTION: When an "Add to Cart" action fails, always check for and explicitly address any required fields or error messages on the current product page, even if a default option appears to be selected. Prioritize direct error resolution to avoid unnecessary navigation and repeated steps.
